steps.name: bottom-tab-bar
steps.summary: components/BottomTabBar.tsx(4탭 fixed 하단바, usePathname 활성탭 강조), app/dashboard/layout.tsx(pb-20 여백 포함) 생성 완료

steps.name: dashboard-shell
steps.summary: app/dashboard/page.tsx(유저+이번주 posts 페칭, redirect 처리), DashboardClient.tsx(선택날짜 상태, 헤더 업종명+남은횟수), WeekTab.tsx(7탭, 오늘강조, 미업로드/완료 점 구분) 생성 완료
